label: Obtain Data Exchange Authorization by Policy
description: Query catalog with filters, negotiate a contract matching a specific policy, initiate a PULL transfer, and return the EDR token and dataplane URL.

params.name: counter_party_address
params.description: DSP endpoint of the provider connector

params.name: filters
params.description: Filter expressions to narrow catalog results

params.name: policies
params.description: ODRL policies the offer must match

params.name: max_wait
params.description: Max seconds to wait for transfer completion

outputs.name: edr_token
outputs.description: EDR authorization token for dataplane calls
